- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Built a book-summary website named ChapterCut using Next.js, TypeScript, and the App Router.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Created the project structure manually after automated scaffolding was blocked by Windows PowerShell policy prompts.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Added the landing page, summary form, local fallback summarizer, and OpenAI-backed summarize API route.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions were specified for this project type.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Installed dependencies, fixed the ESLint flat config, and verified both `npm run lint` and `npm run build` succeed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Added a VS Code task that starts the dev server with `cmd /c npm run dev` to avoid PowerShell script policy issues.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  Summary: The dev server task is available and starts successfully at `http://localhost:3000`. No separate debug launch configuration was created.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: Added README.md, .env.example, and cleaned this file to remove template comments.
